text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, February 09. No work meetings today. You have gardening in the front walkway and FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville.

text: Quick log: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Parenting is a constant learning process.

text: Logged that. Toddlers are full of energy. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Parenting is definitely a journey.

text: Just wanted to mention that cooking dinner for the kids tonight. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.

text: Logged that. Meal planning saves so much time. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.

text: Understood. Automations are great when they work. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. Safety is always the priority.
